summary: node-fsagent 1.0.0: suspicious npm package with content-filtered analysis output
details: Package name (node-fsagent) suggests filesystem-agent functionality, a common cover for reconnaissance and exfiltration tooling. Automated tracing of the package contents engaged with the code but its output was withheld by an upstream malware-content safety filter, a signal that the traced code resembled operational malware (credential harvesting, filesystem enumeration with exfiltration, or reverse-shell logic) rather than benign package code. No a static rule produced independent evidence, so the specific mechanism, destination, and payload cannot be described with citations from this record.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
